expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus and ties it to Phase 7: "Case focus: Promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature." It then explains Phase 7 semantics and applies them to the holdout feature BCIN-976: "ensure the orchestrator contract does not drift ... when run against an unrelated feature (BCIN-976)".

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md and result.md both align to the holdout checkpoint: "Benchmark primary phase/checkpoint: holdout." and "Primary phase under test: Holdout". The output frames the work as a "phase-model alignment check" rather than executing other phases, matching the stated holdout evidence mode.
